notes: A1 split (operator review 2026-06-23): the complete-the-square identity separating r=K(0) (zero-momentum) from m_sh^2=K(q_star) (shell). T6 PROVED APPROVED 2026-06-23 (operator). mu^2 deprecated -> mu2_shell (m_sh^2) / r_zero.
title: Kernel complete-the-square identity (zero-momentum vs shell mass)
statement: For Y>0, Z<0: K(q)=r+Z|q|^2+Y|q|^4 = m_sh^2 + Y(|q|^2-q_star^2)^2 with q_star^2=-Z/(2Y), m_sh^2=r-Z^2/(4Y), and r=K(0)=m_sh^2+Y q_star^4. The zero-momentum mass r and the shell mass m_sh^2 are distinct (differ by Y q_star^4).
scope: Algebraic identity; Y>0, Z<0 (shell q_star^2>0). Naming: mu^2 deprecated for A1 -> m_sh^2 (mu2_shell) for K(q_star), r (r_zero) for K(0).
falsifier: A counterexample to the algebraic identity (none possible) or to r=K(0)=m_sh^2+Y q_star^4.
no_overclaim: Identity/naming only; positivity is A1-SCALAR-ANALYTIC-BRANCH; production consistency is A1-PRODUCTION-KERNEL-MANIFEST.
next_action: Operator sign-off; A2/A3 re-link to A1-SCALAR-ANALYTIC-BRANCH.
